narrative:
Rootstown Township has 6,156 registered voters, with 58.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.2%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.9 percentage points.
